name: SplitPane

unions.name: Size
unions.comment: Size in either pixels or percentage.

aliases.name: HtmlDetails
aliases.comment: Lets you specify attributes such as style and children for the splitter element
aliases.type: { attributes : List (Attribute msg), children : List (Html msg) }

values.name: changeHeight
values.comment:
Change the height of the pane.

        newModel = model.pane |> changeHeight 400

values.name: changeOrientationTo
values.comment:
Set the orientation of the pane.

        init =
            SplitPane.init
                { paneWidth = 800
                , paneHeight = 600
                }
                |> changeOrientationTo Vertical

values.name: changeWidth
values.comment:
Change the width of the pane.

        newModel = model.pane |> changeWidth 600

values.name: customSplitter
values.comment:
Creates a custom splitter.

        myCustomSplitter : CustomSplitter SplitPane.Msg
        myCustomSplitter =
            customSplitter identity
                { attributes =
                    [ style
                        [ ( "width", "20px" )
                        , ( "height", "20px" )
                        ]
                    ]
                , children =
                    []
                }

values.name: draggable
values.comment:
Make pane splitter draggable or not

        init =
            SplitPane.init
                { paneWidth = 800
                , paneHeight = 600
                }
                |> draggable False

values.name: height
values.comment: Retrieves current height of the pane from the model.

values.name: init
values.comment:
Initialize a new model.

        init
            { paneWidth = 600
            , paneHeight = 600
            }
values.type: { a | paneHeight : Px, paneWidth : Px } -> Model

values.name: moveSplitterTo
values.comment:
Moves the splitter to the requested location (relative to the edge of the pane)

        init =
            SplitPane.init
                { paneWidth = 800
                , paneHeight = 600
                }
                |> moveSplitterTo (Percentage 0.33)

values.name: orientation
values.comment: Retrieves current orientation of the pane from the model.

values.name: splitterPosition
values.comment: Retrieves current splitter position in pixels from the model (relative to the edge of the pane).

values.name: startAt
values.comment:
Sets the starting position for the splitter (relative to the edge of the pane).

        init =
            SplitPane.init
                { paneWidth = 800
                , paneHeight = 600
                }
                |> startAt 300

values.name: subscriptions
values.comment: Subscribes to relevant events for resizing

values.name: view
values.comment:
Default pane with two views

        view : SplitPane.Model -> Html SplitPane.Msg
        view model =
            SplitPane.view identity firstView secondView model


        firstView : Html a
        firstView =
            img [ src "http://4.bp.blogspot.com/-s3sIvuCfg4o/VP-82RkCOGI/AAAAAAAALSY/509obByLvNw/s1600/baby-cat-wallpaper.jpg" ] []


        secondView : Html a
        secondView =
            img [ src "http://2.bp.blogspot.com/-pATX0YgNSFs/VP-82AQKcuI/AAAAAAAALSU/Vet9e7Qsjjw/s1600/Cat-hd-wallpapers.jpg" ] []
values.type: (Msg -> msg) -> Html msg -> Html msg -> Model -> Html msg

values.name: viewWithCustomSplitter
values.comment:
A pane with custom splitter.

        view : SplitPane.Model -> Html SplitPane.Msg
        view =
            SplitPane.viewWithCustomSplitter myCustomSplitter firstView secondView


        myCustomSplitter : CustomSplitter SplitPane.Msg
        myCustomSplitter =
            customSplitter identity
                { attributes =
                    [ style
                        [ ( "width", "20px" )
                        , ( "height", "20px" )
                        ]
                    ]
                , children =
                    []
                }

        firstView : Html a
        firstView =
            img [ src "http://4.bp.blogspot.com/-s3sIvuCfg4o/VP-82RkCOGI/AAAAAAAALSY/509obByLvNw/s1600/baby-cat-wallpaper.jpg" ] []


        secondView : Html a
        secondView =
            img [ src "http://2.bp.blogspot.com/-pATX0YgNSFs/VP-82AQKcuI/AAAAAAAALSU/Vet9e7Qsjjw/s1600/Cat-hd-wallpapers.jpg" ] []
values.type: CustomSplitter msg -> Html msg -> Html msg -> Model -> Html msg

values.name: width
values.comment: Retrieves current width of the pane from the model.

values.name: withFirstViewMinSize
values.comment:
Set minimum size for the first view.
    When the pane is horizontal, this is the left view.
    When the pane is vertical, this is the top view.

        init =
            SplitPane.init
                { paneWidth = 800
                , paneHeight = 600
                }
                |> withFirstViewMinSize (Percentage 0.2)

values.name: withSecondViewMinSize
values.comment:
Set minimum size for the second view.
    When the pane is horizontal, this is the right view.
    When the pane is vertical, this is the bottom view.

        init =
            SplitPane.init
                { paneWidth = 800
                , paneHeight = 600
                }
                |> withSecondViewMinSize (Px 100)
